mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNLOGINHIST ( HIST_ID, USER_ID, USER_NM, USER_SE, LOGIN_RESULT, LOGIN_IP, LOGIN_MESSAGE, LOGIN_PNTTM ) VALUES ( #{histId}, #{userId}, #{userNm}, #{userSe}, #{loginResult}, #{loginIp}, #{loginMessage}, CURRENT_DATETIME )

where.if: AND LOGIN_RESULT = 'FAIL' AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '')) LIKE '%lock%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '')) LIKE '%block%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '')) LIKE '%refused%' OR COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '') LIKE '%잠%' OR COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '') LIKE '%차단%' OR COALESCE(LOGIN_MESSAGE, '') LIKE '%거부%' )
